# Paragon Pool & Spa — Vacation in Your Own Backyard

> Paragon Pool & Spa is a family-owned pool, spa, and sauna specialist serving the Twin Cities metro area in Minnesota for over 35 years. We design, build, install, and maintain inground pools, hot tubs, saunas, and automatic pool covers. BBB A+ rated.

## About

Paragon Pool & Spa (legally Paragon Pool and Patio, Inc.) was founded in 1990 by Mike Henry. We have three showroom locations across the east Twin Cities metro — in Willernie, Stillwater, and Forest Lake. We specialize in inground vinyl liner pools, hot tubs, saunas, and pool renovations with a focus on quality craftsmanship and customer service.

## Services

### Pool Construction
Custom inground pool design and installation — vinyl liner pools engineered for Minnesota's freeze-thaw climate.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/services

### Hot Tubs & Spas
Hot tub sales, delivery, and installation from leading brands. Year-round enjoyment in Minnesota.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/products

### Saunas
Indoor and outdoor sauna installation — traditional and infrared options.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/products

### Automatic Pool Covers
Safety covers that protect children and pets while reducing maintenance and heating costs.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/services

### Pool Renovation
Liner replacement, equipment upgrades, and complete pool makeovers.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/services

### Pool Maintenance
Seasonal opening and closing, water chemistry, equipment repair.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/services

## Packages

We offer complete pool packages at different price points, including pool + patio + cover bundles.
URL: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com/packages

## Key Facts

- Founded: 1990
- Owner: Mike Henry (President & Founder)
- BBB Rating: A+
- Service Area: Twin Cities metro — Mahtomedi, Willernie, White Bear Lake, Stillwater, Forest Lake, Woodbury, Maplewood, Oakdale, Lake Elmo, Hugo, Blaine, Minnetonka
- Specialties: Inground pools, hot tubs, saunas, automatic pool covers, pool renovation
- Email: sales@paragonpoolandspa.com
- Website: https://www.paragonpoolandspa.com

## Hours

Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM
